reviews.review_title: We need to fix this game NOW!
reviews.review_description:
So basically I downloaded this game again because I deleted it. I had high hopes to have a fun time because of the memories I had from this game. BUT every single time I play the game there is a moder in the lobby and they all ways kick me from the game. This makes it so I can’t even play the game.

This game needs…
-better ways to prevent mods
-funner gameplay for everyone


Just wish we could go back to the good times…

When this game caught my attention when I saw Jman playing it and once I downloaded it it was one of my favorite games ever it was actually fun unlike the gtag copies the horror was good the game peaked around v2 I loved that version so much too this day there’s a lot of apk’s going around and some have early versions of the game though I whis the game would keep updating it just reminds me when horror chapter 1 got updated in v2 or the Halloween update or “escape” cube runners if u were able to make cube runners again I would recommend remaking the game odes from v2 horror from all versions so like 3 chapters and collectabes from all versions the store from v2 with pets and how to survive videos because every version had its own good thing the game was good because it was simple and chill with the August 12 2036 thing it felt like it had passion into it I would like to see the lore more because it was good though the game doesn’t gets updated anymore It’s one of my favorite games of all time and I would like to have to see the deadzone elevator, the pets, the old cyclops, the familiar forests, the weird destroyed cube thing from the first chase in v2, the ghosts in horror and the gamemode, apple island, og store, the detailed spiders, the tight gaps, the play place part in Mr.happys play place, that one two legged thing that was in Mr. Happy’s play place, maze game mode,bounce game mode, and more I hope you or others can see this and share what they loved about this game and why. -Tigg

reviews.review_title: Explaining why the game is unplayble
reviews.review_description: The reason is that the game's files got corrupted, the owner, xdee1 didn't have a way of bringing the game back.  he decided to remove the anti cheat because the game was already ruined anyway. Those giant entities that kick you would normally be owned by devs. However, xdee1 (creator) made a new game. "novalight" the game is somewhat similar to cube runners and isn't ruined by modders. If you ask me I personally think novalight is better than cube runners. I give the game 5 stars because of what it used to be. (if you really wanna play cube runners so badly just join a private code and the game will work just fine) Hope this helpd!

reviews.review_title: I wish this gets more updates
reviews.review_description: So how did I find this game? I was helping someone on the first planet in Novolite, and then he said I came from Cube Runners. I'd heard about runners before, but I didn't really want to look into it. But when I start it it was amazing. I loved all the cosmetics and game modes. But there's been one recent problem. Admin abuses. If you're going to download this game, beware of admin abuses trust me it's not no ordinary admin abuse. I experience it for one day and I'm scarred.

reviews.review_title: A better version of Gorilla tag.
reviews.review_description:
The game has a lot of things that makes it better than what it was inspired from. 


First of, there’s more than 4 game modes and there are pretty fun. And the horror mode is probably the best horror game out there.

Second of all, the community has barely any toxicity. I don’t know if it’s just me being lucky or the community letting the moderators rest

Thirdly, the cosmetics fit perfectly no matter what. And there’s so, SO many options to choose from.

And lastly, they add many things (in a positive way). The cafe, the cafeteria, the TV just to name a few.


This is why in my opinion, that cube runners is better than GTAG (no offense to GTAG players).

So the moderation and safety systems need some reworks if the devs come back to this.
